gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the health metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot acting as an automated gardener, watering pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse, while Polly the bee hovers nearby with a clipboard to record the daily metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard, checking off metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard, checking off metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background.
